items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of the persona scenario related to 'Data export audit trails'. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The lack of specific evidence regarding the outcome of this scenario leads to an inconclusive status, as it cannot be determined if the requirement is satisfied.
